title: mecodium australe
intro: Mecodium australe, also known as the Austral Mecodium fern or the Australian climbing fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Mecodium australe are thought to include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant protection, making it a popular herbal remedy in some parts of the world. Mecodium australe is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be dried and used in capsules or tinctures for its medicinal properties.
